content.en:
"Lord of the Crane!"

Wuji Ice Ancestor felt the aura of the Spirit Crane Lord and immediately frowned.

She had dealt with the Spirit Crane Lord before, but at that time, the Spirit Crane Lord was only in the half-step Eternal Realm, and he had only visited her as a junior.

Of course, the two have only met once.

But I never expected that the Spirit Crane Lord would become an eternal realm by luck.

Although the Spirit Crane Lord was not an Eternal Realm that had broken through to the Extreme Realm with a half-step Eternal Realm, it was a normal breakthrough, and it had been a long time since he broke through to the Eternal Realm, and his strength was naturally very terrifying, far surpassing the Infinite Ice Ancestor.

"Run!"

The Infinite Ice Ancestor didn't want to fight an Eternal Realm existence, even if the Spirit Crane Lord's strength in the Eternal Realm was not strong, it was still not an existence that she could compete with.

"Wuji Ice Ancestor, you dare to kill the master of the master!!!

A large hand that covered the endless void of the Source Sea suppressed it.

Pieces of territory shattered and shattered, but the Infinite Ice Ancestor pierced through and left in time.

Rumble!!!!!

The Spirit Crane Lord appeared and pursued the Infinite Ice Ancestor.

Soon, the Infinite Ice Ancestor was caught up.

Even if she was a half-step Eternal Realm in the Seven Extremes Realm, it would be too difficult for her to escape from the pursuit of the Eternal Realm.

Unless you hide in some specific areas, you can avoid the pursuit of the Eternal Realm.

For example, the Supreme Eternal Tribulation Domain of the Eternal Tribulation Clan, this world is very special, even the Eternal Realm is difficult to enter it, and it requires a great price.

Otherwise, the Eternal Tribulation would have ceased to exist long ago.

In addition to the Supreme Eternal Tribulation Domain, there are also some special places that also restrict the entry of the Eternal Realm, or will make the strength of the Eternal Realm plummet.

And the Infinite Ice Ancestor wanted to hide in such a place, but unfortunately her speed was a little slower, and she was caught up by the Spirit Crane Lord.

I saw that the Spirit Crane Lord slammed over with a punch, and the body that was integrated into the Innate Eternal Rules, without the need to mobilize any power of the Innate Eternal Rules, he overrode the Innate Eternal Rules and shattered all the rules.

The Infinite Ice Ancestor urged the Infinite Smoothie, an eternal origin weapon, to form layers of ice defense.

However.

With this punch, everything was silent.

The Infinite Smoothie Eternal Origin Weapon turned into a grain of smoothie shattered and annihilated, piercing through many of the Infinite Ice Ancestor's defensive treasures and bombarding the Infinite Ice Ancestor's body.

Click!!!

The body of the Infinite Ice Ancestor was shattered, half of it was directly annihilated, making it difficult to recover, while the other half of the body was also filled with countless cracks.

If he took another blow, the Infinite Ice Ancestor was afraid that he would fall.

"It's worthy of being a half-step Eternal Realm of the Seven Extremes Realm, and you will not die after receiving a blow from me, but it's a pity that you don't enter the Eternal Realm for a day, you will always be an ant!"

The Spirit Crane Lord blasted in with another punch, wanting to completely wipe out the Infinite Ice Ancestor.

But at this moment, the jade hand that had been slender blocked the Spirit Crane Lord's punch, and directly shook the Spirit Crane Lord away.

Wow!

A beautiful figure appeared in front of the Infinite Ice Ancestor, smiling at the Spirit Crane Lord.

"Spirit Crane Lord, let's go over this matter, the Star Demon Source Ancestor has killed too many Supreme Beings and the Half-Step Eternal Realm, and he also killed the descendants of the Wuji Ice Ancestor, and the Wuji Ice Ancestor killed the Star Demon Source Ancestor, there is nothing wrong with this!"

The woman spoke.

"I've seen the Dressing Lord, does the Dressing Lord really want to come forward for a half-step Eternal Realm?" asked the Spirit Crane Lord.

"That's good!" The Clothed Lord said with a smile: "Wuji Ice Ancestor, I have a good deal, and why is there a Blood Devouring Bead in the hands of the Star Demon Source Ancestor, the refining method of this thing is only available in our Eternal Realm, and using the Blood Devouring Bead to impact the Pseudo Eternal Realm is a forbidden way that is not allowed to spread, if the Spirit Crane Lord insists on killing the Wuji Ice Ancestor, I am afraid that I will have to report it to the Lord Alliance." "

The Spirit Crane Lord's expression changed, and then he changed his face and smiled: "The Dress Lord said that he laughed, this is just a small matter, I will leave." "

Wow!

The Crane Lord turned and left.

"Thank you, Lord of Clothes!"

Wuji Ice Ancestor said gratefully.

"Wuji Ice Ancestor, you are very talented and have the hope of becoming an Eternal Realm, the last time I invited you to be my retinue, you refused, so what about this time?" the Dress Lord invited again.

"Dress Lord, I am willing to be your retinue!"

Infinite Ice Ancestor agreed.

"Okay, then I'll take you away!"

With a wave of his hand, the Tycoon Lord left with the Infinite Ice Ancestor and disappeared.

----------------

The Star Demon Origin Ancestor fell, and the Spirit Crane Lord appeared, chasing and killing the Infinite Ice Ancestor, and was rescued by another Eternal Realm Clothed Lord.

This dramatic scene spread quickly, and many people were not very familiar with the Spirit Crane Lord and the Dress Lord, especially the Dress Lord, who had almost no impression of the half-step Eternal Realm.

However, the Star Demon Origin Ancestor has fallen, which is a great thing for many forces, at least they don't need to worry about it every day, and they spend it in panic.

However, Ye Tian had another feeling.

That is, the half-step Eternal Realm has no sense of security, and in the face of the existence of the Eternal Realm, even if it is a half-step Eternal Realm, it is just an ant.

Of course, the Eternal Realm rarely appears in the Source Sea, unless it is a situation like this one, which involves special circumstances that cause the existence of the Eternal Realm.

Otherwise, a half-step Eternal Realm might even die in battle, and he would not necessarily encounter an Eternal Realm powerhouse.

In the following years, Ye Tian worked hard to cultivate and improve his strength, and gradually forgot about this incident.

As the years passed, Ye Tian's cultivation continued to improve, but he was still far from the ultimate of the Eightfold Supreme.

So in the long years, he occasionally went to the eternal world to experience it, and even occasionally accompanied his wife Xiao Yue to travel in many treasure places.

And the human race is also developing rapidly, giving birth to many supreme beings, who have already surpassed the Tianlin Realm.

Now, the Tianlin Realm also has to rely on the Dark Forbidden Domain, and even use the Dark Forbidden Domain as a backer.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years of catastrophe have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had finally cultivated to the extreme of the Eightfold Supreme and was qualified to impact the Ninefold Supreme realm, and this was also the biggest dream of many Supreme Beings in their lives.

There was no difficulty in breaking through this time, after all, Ye Tian had already comprehended the innate eternal rules, so it was naturally not difficult to attack the Nine Folds Peerless.

Soon, Ye Tian broke through to the realm of the Nine Levels of Supreme, and his strength improved a little again.

With Ye Tian's current strength, it is enough to be comparable to the top half-step Eternal Realm, if it is with the help of the fingers of the Eternal Realm, I am afraid that it is enough to perform an attack comparable to the Extreme Realm, but the ultimate strength is still a little worse than the real Extreme Realm.
